basic_details.job_title: ACTREC Medical Social Worker Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) Medical Social Worker Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. OS-A/73/2026 on the official website of ACTREC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ACTREC Medical Social Worker Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for the Medical Social Worker post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable on an experience basis.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Social Work
qualification.details: Medical Social Worker: Post Graduate degree in Social Work. Preferably medical and psychiatry social work with one year experience in counselling of patients in a hospital.

all_official_links.label: Download ACTREC Medical Social Worker Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ACTREC Medical Social Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on 17th June 2026. There is no separate application deadline before the walk-in date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Social Worker post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Social Work. Experience in medical and psychiatry social work with one year of patient counselling in a hospital is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Medical Social Worker position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years. However, this limit may be relaxed based on the candidate's experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Social Worker role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Medical Social Worker position ranges from Rs. 28,450 to Rs. 35,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ACTREC Medical Social Worker job?
faq.answer: The application process is a Walk-in Interview. Interested candidates need to report to the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview for ACTREC Medical Social Worker recruitment being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Meeting Room-306, 3rd floor, Paymaster Shodhika, TMC-ACTREC, Sec-22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai- 410210.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry their Bio-data, recent passport size photograph, scanned copies of Aadhar Card, PAN CARD, ORIGINAL and Self Attested copies of qualification certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Medical Social Worker position?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the recruiting organization?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC).
